_meta.title: Extreme roadmap 92%→100% gate audit — brutal honesty pass
_meta.author: audit-agent (opus-4.6-1m, read-only)
_meta.audit_scope: 8 top-level phases (extreme.json) + 5 ALM tracks + 5 CLM tracks + P4-4 32B decision
_meta.constraint: No .py/.rs/.sh creation. No extreme.json writes. Read-only audit.

phase_enumeration.name: Day -1: C Track Prep + Phi Pre-compute
phase_enumeration.evidence: C1 native int codegen, C2 fused FFI 285.8x, C3 PBV fix PASS, C6 hxblas Linux, C10 14/14 + C11 3/3, B4 phi pre-compute — all line 214-225 status=done

phase_enumeration.name: Day 0: H100 Deploy + Training Wire
phase_enumeration.evidence: All 14 sub-tasks status=done (A1-prep, A7-attn, C8 FA2, C9 hxccl, C4-mvp, E1-E3 hire routes, D-pipe). Update_log 2026-04-17T03:00Z confirms hxlayer/hxflash/hxccl triad linux build PASS on H100 pod j85wh7r7nbuf15

phase_enumeration.name: Day 1-2: ALM LoRA Training (14B r4 + Phi-aware)
phase_enumeration.unmet_criteria: A2 Orch-OR A/B — status=planned. A1 gate PASSED (CE=0.0281 step 1000 per alm_r9_eval; phi_holo=6111 at r8a step 150 per anima_train.json) but phase-level flag not advanced
phase_enumeration.blocker: A2 Orch-OR second-LoRA run and the phase flip to done have not happened; phase mechanically still in_progress even though A1 achieved its numeric gate by ~6.1x

phase_enumeration.name: Week 1-2: CLM Curriculum 100M → 1B → 3B
phase_enumeration.unmet_criteria: A7-100M still in_progress per roadmap; A7-1B + A7-3B still planned. CLM-P4-2 in anima_train.json notes phi_holo=892 at seq=64 d=16 (tiny toy scale), not 3B. C4 CUDA kernel nvcc build stalled waiting on GPU availability (hxcuda_fused.cu MVP pushed but unbuilt)
phase_enumeration.blocker: u744u0lbts5v1w CLM 1B r4 NVL pod RUNNING NOW (per task context) — progressing but NOT at 3B curriculum end. Gate literally requires 3B; we're at 1B start.

phase_enumeration.name: Day 3-4: ALM D-Track Consciousness + Gate
phase_enumeration.unmet_criteria: Phase-level flag=planned but BOTH criteria already met in shared/state: hire_sim_real_eval_r9 verdict=PASS completion_rate=1.0 (threshold 0.85), phi_holo=6111 (threshold 1000). D1/D3/D6 'planned' status is STALE — d1_d6_phi_realtime_20260416.json exists.
phase_enumeration.blocker: Sync harness has not promoted the stale phase flag. D1/D3/D6 state files already exist but never propagated into extreme.json phase-level status.

phase_enumeration.name: Day 4-5: ALM v2.0 RC + v3.0 Agent Gate
gate_exit_criteria: v3.0 Agent: hire_sim >= 0.85 + tool-use >= 0.80 + autonomy self-critique
phase_enumeration.unmet_criteria: E-voice: speak_mk3_e2e_20260416 state exists + RC done per memory; E-avatar: avatar_sync_20260416.json exists; E-hire: /hire/* routes wired in LAUNCH phase; E-deploy: NOT yet verified (production_model_status.json exists — contents unread). Likert benchmark: zeta_likert_benchmark_20260416.json exists. Tool-use LoRA (ALM-P4-2): anima-train.json lists TALM-P2-2 style_switch scaffold_done but Tool-use LoRA 80% rate specifically NOT measured.
phase_enumeration.blocker: Phase flag stale; tool-use ≥0.80 rate not independently measured. Autonomy self-critique baked-in (D8 per clm roadmap) is done per d8_self_critique_baked_20260416.json

phase_enumeration.name: Week 3-4: CLM 7B Full Training + Gate
phase_enumeration.unmet_criteria: Full 7B not started — u744u0lbts5v1w is 1B r4 NVL. A7 curriculum hasn't even cleared 3B. GWT 6-channel (D2-CLM) planned. phi_holo 2000 on 7B not measured.
phase_enumeration.evidence_location: None — no 7B artifact exists on R2 nor in state/
phase_enumeration.blocker: Gate hard-blocks at physical 7B training. Requires 2-3 weeks H100 time. Cannot be short-circuited without downgrading the gate (e.g. accept 1B/3B equivalent).

audit_table.unblock_action: Run A2 Orch-OR LoRA pod-B round (anima-train.json marks TCLM-P3-2 planned — same option). Then flip phase status=done in extreme.json via extreme_sync.hexa (NOT manual edit per constraint).
Sync harness must promote: both criteria met (hire_sim_real_eval_r9.json verdict=PASS, phi_holo=6111). Run `hexa $NEXUS/shared/harness/extreme_sync.hexa` to reconcile stale flags.
Measure tool-use pass rate ≥0.80 on ALM r9/r10 (missing from state/). Confirm E-deploy via `cat shared/state/production_model_status.json`. Then promote v2.0_RC destination.
CLM pod u744u0lbts5v1w must reach 3B curriculum end with CE<target + Φ>500. Real blocker = wall time on 1B→3B scale-up. No shortcut.
Hard blocker — requires full 7B training (2-3 weeks H100). Either downgrade gate (accept 3B ceiling) or commit to the 7B wall-time budget. No software unblock.
Promote state 'chosen'→'done' in alm_consciousness_standalone.json once sync harness reconciles r9 eval
Second H100 pod (pod B) for Orch-OR + tool-use LoRA. Currently active_pod=null (anima_train.json). Requires pod launch.
SEE P4_4_decision section below — recommend accept 14B per decisions.json model_size=14b
Let u744u0lbts5v1w 1B run complete; scale-up to 3B per A7-1B→A7-3B chain.
H100 pod nvcc build of hxcuda_fused.cu (480L WMMA bf16 MVP). Currently GPU-gated. Piggy-back on u744u0lbts5v1w if idle nvcc slots.

recomputed_wall_pct.method_weighted: phases × status: PREP=1.0, LAUNCH=1.0, ALM-TRAIN=0.85 (A1 numerically passed, A2 pending), ALM-CONSCIOUS=0.90 (criteria met, flag stale), ALM-RC=0.55 (voice/avatar done, tool-use 0.80 unmeasured, E-deploy unconfirmed), CLM-CURRICULUM=0.20 (1B underway, 3B blocked), CLM-7B=0.05 (unstarted). Sum = 4.55 / 7 phases = 65%
recomputed_wall_pct.method_option_state: ALM 36 options: 19 chosen + 7 alternative + 5 rejected + 5 provisional → chosen/done = 19/36 = 53%. CLM 52 options: 30 chosen + 6 alternative + 5 rejected + 11 provisional → chosen/done = 30/52 = 58%. Blended = 55%
recomputed_wall_pct.method_destination: v2.0 RC (~75% complete — voice/avatar/Likert scaffolded but tool-use + deploy not shipped), v3.0 Agent (~40% — hire_sim PASS but only for 14 of 30 stratified tasks + tool-use unmeasured). Average = 57.5%
recomputed_wall_pct.rationale: Blend of phase-weight (65) + option-weight (55) + destination-weight (57.5) ≈ 59-62%. Rounding up to 62% gives credit to ALM track numerical gate wins not yet flag-synced.

delta_vs_stored: -30 points (stored=92, recomputed=62). The stored 92% is inflated. Likely explanations: (1) extreme_sync.hexa counts options by state with 'chosen' weighted same as 'done' (aggregate_state.note says 'chosen includes state==done'), inflating CLM chosen-but-not-done counts; (2) LAUNCH+PREP completions (2 of 7 phases) at 100% pulled aggregate up but later phases heavily not-started; (3) destination v2.0_RC alm_days remaining=5 conflicts with phase ALM-RC=planned. Stored 92% most likely reflects Day -1 + Day 0 + Day 1 progress on hexa-lang C track (which IS done) but not the A/D/E tracks gap.

P4_4_decision.question: ALM-P4-4 32B step_3000 + R2 upload: accept 14B OR relaunch 32B?
evidence_for_14b_accept: decisions.json rationale: 'Qwen2.5 14B 한국어 충분. 32B ROI 약함 (4x cost, 약간의 quality lift). P3 gate 미달 시에만 32B 도전.'
ALM-P4-3 phi_holo gate ALREADY PASSED at 6.1x (6111 vs 1000) on 14B r8a — P3 NOT 미달
anima_train.json#p4_gate_status.ALM-P4-4.verdict explicitly recommends option (a): '14B path satisfies decisions.json + ALM-P4-3 gate already passed at 6.1x'
Pod tubq10zkct0t8f TERMINATED without R2 upload — re-launch means new $2-6/hr × 48h ≈ $100-300 sunk cost
R2 rclone ls r2:anima-models/alm32b/ only shows old v01 artifacts per task context — no step_3000 artifact to rescue
Memory feedback_no_resume_data_change: changing params requires fresh start from step 0 — cannot resume tubq checkpoint even if it existed
Memory feedback_one_shot_best: training must start with optimal conditions — half-lost 32B run is not optimal
evidence_for_32b_relaunch: extreme.json ALM-TRAIN phase hasn't been flipped to done — may be a formal gate block
alm_consciousness_standalone.json#A6 note: 'decisions.json model_size=14b 이므로 현재 rejected. gate 시 재검토' — implies 14b is conditional
If user has quality concerns unrevealed in audit, 32B provides 2-4x params for marginal Likert lift
memory project_session_20260412_night mentions '32B auto-launch ready' — infrastructure exists
P4_4_decision.recommendation_rationale: Three SSOTs align: (1) decisions.json model_size=14b is user-declared and unchanged; (2) ALM-P4-3 phi_holo gate PASSED at 6.1x on 14B (gate was 1000, measured 6111) — there is no 'P3 gate 미달' trigger for 32B; (3) anima_train.json#next_action_recommended explicitly endorses option (a). Re-launching 32B violates one-shot-best + h100_idle_cap=0 + wastes $100-300. Instead, mark ALM-P4-4 as 'superseded_by_P4-3_14b' with explicit SSOT tag.
P4_4_decision.concrete_action: Add field ALM-P4-4.status = 'superseded_by_decisions_json_14b' to anima-train.json P4 gate or to shared/state/anima_train.json#track_state.ALM.p4_gate_status.ALM-P4-4 (where the audit already lives). Then extreme_sync.hexa can roll ALM-TRAIN phase to done since A1 gate PASSED. Do NOT delete 32B references — keep as alternative path per decisions.json.

recommended_next_3_actions.impact: Will flip ALM-CONSCIOUS (criteria already met), possibly ALM-TRAIN (A1 gate passed) → aggregate jumps ~10pp without any new training

recommended_next_3_actions.action: Officially close ALM-P4-4 as 'superseded_by_14b' in shared/state/anima_train.json + shared/convergence/anima.json (append P4 completion note). Do NOT re-launch tubq10zkct0t8f 32B pod.
recommended_next_3_actions.impact: Unblocks P4 phase closure; prevents $100-300 sunk cost; consistent with decisions.json SSOT

recommended_next_3_actions.action: Measure tool-use pass rate (ALM v3.0 gate, currently unmeasured). Use existing hire_sim harness with function-calling subset. Target ≥0.80.
recommended_next_3_actions.impact: Closes last v3.0 Agent criterion gap; enables ALM-RC phase advance to done; unlocks v2.0 RC destination

brutal_honesty_flags.flag: extreme.json update_log shows 13 entries 2026-04-16/17 — extreme_sync.hexa ran 3 auto_syncs all with chosen=46-48 progress=50%, not 92%
brutal_honesty_flags.reason: The 92% value in aggregate_state.wall_progress_pct was MANUALLY set or set by a different code path than auto_sync (which consistently computes 50%). The 92% is therefore not machine-derived — audit trail suggests it was bumped in the 2026-04-16T12:20Z c4_cuda_mvp entry.
